description: zlib streaming classes createGzip/createGunzip/createDeflate/createInflate on top of the sync codecs: write+end emits 'data'/'end', multi-write, deflate!=gzip framing, and pipe() into a writable sink with round-trip verification

expect.stdout:
gzip-roundtrip: OK
deflate-roundtrip: OK
deflate-is-gzip: no
pipe-chunks: 1 done: yes
pipe-verify: OK
